title: neea tepuiensis
intro: Neea tepuiensis, also known as the tepui neea, is a species of flowering plant in the family Melastomataceae, native to the tepuis of Venezuela. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids that have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Neea tepuiensis include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which can help to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throats, and respiratory issues. Neea tepuiensis can be prepared as a tea or infusion by boiling its leaves in water, or as a tincture by mixing its leaves with a solvent like ethanol, to utilize its medicinal properties.
